---
name: Pricing update
about: A model price has changed or a new model is missing from cost.py
labels: maintenance
---

**Model name**
Exact model string as it appears in Claude Code logs (e.g. `claude-opus-4-7`).

**Current price in cost.py**
Input tokens per million: $
Output tokens per million: $

**Correct price**
Input tokens per million: $
Output tokens per million: $

**Source**
Link to the official Anthropic pricing page or announcement confirming the new price.

**Additional context**
Any notes on cache read/write pricing, or other variants of this model.
